description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using Ruby images (ruby:2.1 as the default and ruby:2.3.1 for specific jobs) with a cache on vendor/ruby. Define hidden before_script templates that run ./scripts/prepare_build.sh, ruby -v, gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc and bundle install (using gemfiles/rails_42.gemfile or gemfiles/rails_50.gemfile where needed). Add a bundler:audit job in the test stage that uses ruby:2.3.1 and executes bundle exec bundle-audit check --update --ignore OSVDB-115941. Add rspec-ruby21-rails42, rspec-ruby23-rails42, and rspec-ruby23-rails50 jobs (all in the test stage) that inherit the appropriate before_script and run bundle exec rspec spec, with ruby:2.3.1 for the latter two jobs. Add a rubocop job in the test stage that also uses ruby:2.3.1 and runs bundle exec rubocop.
